:x: This Pull Request failed our automated **formatting checks**. Please resolve these prior to requesting review. We use Air to automatically format R code. Please [install it](https://posit-dev.github.io/air/cli.html) (you may need to close and reopen your IDE, e.g. RStudio or Positron, after that) and run the following command in the terminal (not the R console) to reformat the code:

